message: Welcome to the Key Drivers Report Processing App!

sections.title: Getting Started
sections.content: Upload your PDF file in the 'Upload & Process' tab. The system will extract and analyze the document. It processes text page-by-page, applies smart chunking, and stores structured embeddings.

sections.title: Searching Queries with DSPy
content: Enter a query in the 'Query Search' tab to retrieve relevant documents using AI embeddings.
The app uses FAISS indexing and DSPy’s **BootstrapFewShot retrieval** to improve query matching.
DSPy dynamically adjusts retrieval context using learned few-shot examples.
Hybrid Search combines **FAISS vector retrieval** with **keyword-based matching** for better accuracy.

sections.title: DSPy-Based Report Refinements
content: The system applies DSPy-powered **context optimization** to improve document retrieval.
Using **BootstrapFewShot**, DSPy refines query matches based on previous results.
DSPy dynamically enhances the quality of search results and report corrections.
Reinforcement Learning techniques adjust retrieval optimization based on user feedback.

sections.title: DSPy Signature Types
content: DSPy signatures define how the system processes input queries and generates refined outputs.
The following DSPy signatures are currently used:
- **Query Expansion Signature**: Expands user queries for better FAISS matching.
- **Retrieval Signature**: Ensures best document context retrieval before response generation.
- **Correction Signature**: Modifies retrieved data to improve accuracy in structured reports.
- **Refinement Signature**: Uses iterative DSPy models to enhance final output quality.

sections.title: DSPy Optimizers & Compilers
content: DSPy optimizers fine-tune query expansion, retrieval, and report generation.
Currently, the system uses the following DSPy optimizers:
- **BootstrapFewShot**: Selects optimal few-shot examples for retrieval enhancement.
- **KNN Few-Shot**: Dynamically picks context-relevant samples before retrieval.
- **MIPRO (Multi-Iteration Prompt Optimization)**: Enhances multi-step report refinement.
- **COPRO (Contrastive Prompt Optimization)**: Improves output by comparing variations.
- **DSPy Compiler**: Compiles optimized retrieval strategies into a pipeline.

sections.title: Embedding Model Selection & Versioning
content: You can select your preferred embedding model (Titan, Cohere, Claude) from the sidebar.
Model versioning allows you to revert to previously trained versions.
Every model update triggers FAISS reindexing to ensure accurate search results.

sections.title: Tracking Analytics & Performance
content: The system tracks latency, error rates, and query success metrics.
View **real-time analytics in the sidebar charts**, including active queries and retrieval success rates.
DSPy feedback loops improve retrieval accuracy over time.

sections.title: FAISS Indexing & Hybrid Search
content: Each embedding model and dimension has its own FAISS index stored on S3.
Hybrid Search combines **FAISS vector retrieval** with **keyword-based matching**.
Automatic FAISS reindexing ensures that updated embeddings are always indexed correctly.

sections.title: Key Enhancements
content: ✅ **Separate FAISS Index for Each Embedding Model & Dimension** – Stored and retrieved independently.
✅ **Automatic FAISS Reindexing** – Ensures FAISS stays updated for every model.
✅ **DSPy Optimized Query Expansion** – Enhances FAISS search accuracy.
✅ **FAISS Persistence to S3** – Ensures data isn't lost across sessions.
✅ **Multi-Agent DSPy (Future Phase)** – Plans for using **DSPy retrieval + rewriter agents**.
✅ **DSPy-Enhanced Report Correction** – Dynamically refines extracted insights before report generation.

sections.title: Deployment Instructions
content: 1. Clone the repository: `git clone https://github.com/yourrepo.git`
2. Install dependencies: `pip install -r requirements.txt`
3. Run the Streamlit app: `streamlit run st_app_keydrivers.py`
4. Ensure AWS credentials are set up correctly for Bedrock access.

sections.title: Troubleshooting S3 Access
sections.content: Ensure your AWS credentials and permissions are correctly configured. If you face access issues, update your credentials and restart the application.
